title: Stephanococcus crepinianus
taxonomy: Stephanococcus crepinianus is classified as a species of flowering plant in the family Aizoaceae. This succulent plant is native to South Africa. The Aizoaceae family, to which Stephanococcus crepinianus belongs, is commonly known as the ice plant family. Stephanococcus crepinianus is a succulent that stores water in its leaves, stems, or roots to survive dry conditions. Stephanococcus crepinianus is often grown as an ornamental plant due to its attractive flowers and unique growth habit.
